description: The AudioInputDeviceSelection component is a Legacy component part of the old settings UI.

fields.SelectedDeviceName: The name of the currently selected device.
fields.UseFilteredData: Whether to filter the incoming audio.
fields._deviceButtonRoot: The slot to place device selection buttons.
fields._audioStream: The audio stream of the currently selected audio device.
fields._audioOutput: The audio output being used to preview the audio input device.
fields._deviceVolume: The component being used to analyze the incoming audio of the selected input device and turn it into volume.
fields._volumeBar: The bar being used to preview the input audio device volume.

usage: Used in your Local Space settings to select your Audio Input device.
